title: Golden Potato
description: FEAST YOUR EYES AND MOUTH ON THE GOLDEN BAKED POTATO!
body:
**"ugh golden carrots are so MID! i want something BETTER! something GOOD!"** 

**WELL LOOK NO FURTHER THAN THE GOLDEN POTATO!**



Golden Apples: Decent but can be better..

Enchanted Golden Apples: Very good but too hard to find..

Golden Carrots: Also decent and also can be better...

Golden.. 
<details>
<summary>?</summary>

POTATOES ON THE OTHER HAND! BEAUTIFUL! ALL YOU COULD ASK FOR!

</details>




# Features To This Indubitably Delightful Modification (I.D.M) For The Program (game as some may call it) Minecraft:

A Golden Baked Potato

A Texture For The Golden Baked Potato That Is The Original But Shinier (Better!!)

...

Yep

Thats it

This took me like 3 minutes to make


# Reasons You Want To Download This:

A Better Potato Option!! Who Doesnt Want That!

I Just Really Want A Better Potato Option Readily Available On Modrinth 

(side note, if you want to add this to NOT one shot anything and everything and potentially crash your game for whatever reason then add version 1.0.0)
